task_params.title: Arduino Art Build Project Brief
brief_points: Concept: interactive mixed-media piece with light and sensor response
Use simple Arduino control with LEDs, wiring, and a proximity sensor
Materials should include board, jumper wires, LEDs, resistor pack, sensor, power source
Add enclosure or mounting surface that supports painted visual elements
Build order should start with concept sketch, then parts test, then assembly, then final tuning

attributes.title: Arduino Art Build Brainstorm Notes
attributes.content_brief: Loose concept notes about an interactive art piece using LEDs, sensor input, layered visuals, and a simple physical housing.

attributes.title: Arduino Parts Scratch List
attributes.content_brief: Rough list of Arduino Uno, breadboard, jumper wires, LEDs, resistor kit, ultrasonic sensor, USB power bank, and acrylic panel ideas.

attributes.title: Riverfront Poster Color Study
attributes.content_brief: Color palette ideas for a poster project.
